ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" INTEGER /* Type of project (e.g., Concept, Design, Development) */,
  "total_budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "budget_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget owner for the project */,
  "remaining_budget" TEXT /* Remaining budget for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type FOREIGN KEY ("project_type") REFERENCES project_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_budget_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_owner_id") REFERENCES budget_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type (e.g., Concept, Design, Development) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "cost_estimate" TEXT /* Estimated cost range for the project type */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration for projects of this type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget owner */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the owner is responsible for */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the budget owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the budget owner (e.g., Project Manager, Financial Analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget owner was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget owner's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_owners_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the expense belongs to */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the expense */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the expense (e.g., Labor, Materials) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the expense */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number if applicable */,
  "paid_by" TEXT /* Who paid for the expense (e.g., Vendor, Company) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Check) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES expense_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense category (e.g., Labor, Materials) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense category */,
  "cost_center" TEXT /* Cost center associated with the expense category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Project Manager, Budget Owner) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the manager is responsible for */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project manager was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project manager's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
